results.resolved_title: The Bacterial T6SS Effector EvpP Prevents NLRP3 Inflammasome Activation by Inhibiting the Ca-Dependent MAPK-Jnk Pathway.
results.quote: a non-VgrG T6SS effector, EvpP, was identified that significantly inhibited NLRP3 inflammasome activation
results.note: locus_tag ETAE_RS18215 = EvpP in Edwardsiella tarda (confirmed via NCBI/PLOS One PMC4234509). Paper abstract names EvpP as a T6SS effector secreted into host cells of E. tarda. Quote from abstract (no PMCID; abstract retrieved via PubMed).
